Translation.Description: This strange contraption is made of a hard yet pliable material and it's hard to say whether it's organic or mineral based. Gorging on the energy released when a soul is severed from its physical host, the corolla jerks and pulses while emitting nauseating sucking and slurping noises. Not compatible with any form of elegance.
Translation.Provides: +3 Hit Points whenever an enemy is killed
+3 Mana Points whenever an enemy is killed
+3 Stamina whenever an enemy is killed
